messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Pipeline board post exceeds Telegram's 4096-char limit and freezes: budget the tappable link list so the board message always fits (with a visible +N-more overflow), and classify a text-too-long failure distinctly
What it solves: LIVE, USER-FACING OUTAGE — the Telegram Pipeline Board has been frozen since ~00:44 UTC
2026-07-17. BL-497 fixed the SILENCE (the swallowed post error) and thereby logged the real
cause for the first time; it did not and could not fix THIS, since the cause was invisible until
BL-497 shipped:
    sy…
